title: Maki Zenin Totem
description: This texture pack changes the totem into Maki Zenin. It has no effect on the game and does not cause any FPS drops.
body:
English:

This texture pack changes the totem into Maki Zenin. It has no effect on the game and does not cause any FPS drops.

Türkçe:

Bu texture pack, totemi Maki Zenin olarak değiştirir. Oyuna herhangi bir etkisi yoktur ve FPS düşüşüne neden olmaz.
